sqlMap.select: SELECT D.CN, D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( ((substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) OR (substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = d.CN ORDER BY LPAD(NVL(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

SELECT company_id, tenant_id, work_starttime, work_endtime, closed_day, attitude_mod_appl, closed_date_attitude, TO_CHAR(conf_set_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS conf_set_date FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF SET work_starttime = #workStartTime#, work_endtime = #workEndTime#, closed_day = #closedDay#, attitude_mod_appl = #attitudeModAppl#, closed_date_attitude = #closedDateAttitude#, conf_set_date = TO_DATE(#confSetDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM( SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.cn AS userid, DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, TBL_USERMASTER.title$primary$ AS usertitle, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$ AS userName, TBL_USERMASTER.description$primary$ AS deptName, CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE)
TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
#searchGubun# = CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$
ORDER BY TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$
) T1 ) WHERE RN >= #endRow# AND RN <= #startRow#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.title LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
#searchGubun# = CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END

SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, COMPANY_ID AS companyId, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, TYPE_NAME$primary$ AS typeName, ISUSE AS isuse, NVL(PARENT_ID,'') AS parentId, FORM_ID AS formId, ISADD AS isAdd, IMG_PATH AS imgPath FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
ISUSE = #isuse#
PARENT_ID = 'A05'
TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03', 'A05')
AND ISDEL = '0'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET ISUSE = #isuse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, COMPANY_ID AS companyId, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName, TYPE_NAME2 AS typeName2, ISUSE AS isuse, NVL(PARENT_ID,'') AS parentId, FORM_ID AS formId, ISADD AS isAdd FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
SELECT MAX(To_number(SUBSTR(TYPE_ID,2))) + 1 AS MAXTYPEID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FORM_ID, TENANT_ID, FORM_NAME, FORM_NAME2, FORM_HTML FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET TYPE_NAME = #typeName#, TYPE_NAME2 = #typeName2# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE (TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, PARENT_ID, ISADD, ISDEL, IMG_PATH, FORM_ID) VALUES (#typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, 'A05', '1', '0', 'refresh', (SELECT A.FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TYPE_ID = 'A11'))

select.isEqual: SELECT DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #selectedUserId#

SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,12 ,5) AS workstarttime, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,12 ,5) AS workendtime, '0' AS gubun FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT D.CN AS ID, CASE WHEN D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = NULL
OR D.CN=#companyId#
THEN '##' ELSE D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 END AS PARENT, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, D.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS TEXT, CASE D.CN WHEN D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 THEN 'COMP' ELSE 'DEPT' END AS ISCOMP, CASE D.CN WHEN U.DEPARTMENT THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS MYDEPT FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( ((substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 AND D.extensionattribute2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) OR (substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) )
AND NOT((D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 IS NULL OR D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = '') AND D.CN <> D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2)
AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(NVL(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), D.DISPLAYNAME$primary$

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, CN AS USER_ID, TITLE$lang$ AS JIKWI, MAIL AS MAIL, DEPARTMENT AS DEPT_ID, DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS DEPT_NAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
AND $key$ like '%' || #value# || '%'
AND $key$ = #value#
UNION ALL SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, A.CN AS USER_ID, B.TITLE$lang$ AS JIKWI, A.MAIL AS MAIL, B.DEPTID AS DEPT_ID, C.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS DEPT_NAME, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND A.$key$ like '%' || #value# || '%'
AND B.DEPTID = #value#
) AA ORDER BY 8 ASC, 1 ASC
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF TA1 USING ( SELECT #selectedUserId# AS user_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, #workStartTime# AS work_starttime, #workEndTime# AS work_endtime, physicaldeliveryofficename AS company_id, department AS dept_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #selectedUserId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# ) TA2 ON (TA1.USER_ID = TA2.USER_ID AND TA1.TENANT_ID = TA2.TENANT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TA1.WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TA1.USER_ID, TA1.TENANT_ID, TA1.WORK_STARTTIME, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME, TA1.COMPANY_ID, TA1.DEPT_ID) VALUES (TA2.USER_ID, TA2.TENANT_ID, TA2.WORK_STARTTIME, TA2.WORK_ENDTIME, TA2.COMPANY_ID, TA2.DEPT_ID)
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#selectedUserIdList[]#
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF TA1 USING ( SELECT cn AS user_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, #workStartTime# AS work_starttime, #workEndTime# AS work_endtime, physicaldeliveryofficename AS company_id, department AS dept_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE department = #selectDeptId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# ) TA2 ON (TA1.USER_ID = TA2.USER_ID AND TA1.TENANT_ID = TA2.TENANT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TA1.WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TA1.USER_ID, TA1.TENANT_ID, TA1.WORK_STARTTIME, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME, TA1.COMPANY_ID, TA1.DEPT_ID) VALUES (TA2.USER_ID, TA2.TENANT_ID, TA2.WORK_STARTTIME, TA2.WORK_ENDTIME, TA2.COMPANY_ID, TA2.DEPT_ID)
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#selectDeptId[]#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT A.attitude_id AS attitudeid, A.company_id AS companyid, A.tenant_id AS tenantid, A.writer_id AS writerid, A.dept_id AS deptid, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS startdate, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) AS starttime, DECODE(A.end_date, NULL, '', TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS enddate, DECODE(A.end_date, NULL, '', SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) AS endtime, A.modappl, A.ip, A.date_type AS datetype, A.type_id AS typeid, B.type_name$primary$ AS typename, C.displayname$primary$ AS username, C.description$primary$ AS deptname, C.title$primary$ AS usertitle FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.department = #searchDeptId#
C.description$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
C.displayname$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
C.title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
#deptIdList[]#
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, startdate DESC, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
ORDER BY startdate DESC, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
) T1 )
RN >= #endRow# AND RN <= #startRow#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.DEPARTMENT = #searchDeptId#
C.description LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
C.displayname LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
C.title LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT A.cn AS writerid, A.displayname$primary$ AS username, A.description$primary$ AS deptname, A.title$primary$ AS usertitle, A.mail AS useremail, SUBSTR(TO_DATE(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 1, 10) as startdate FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_ATTITUDE C WHERE C.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (C.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND C.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (C.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND C.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (C.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND C.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )) B ON A.cn = B.writer_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND B.start_date IS NULL
A.description$primary$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
A.displayname$primary$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
A.title$primary$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
A.department = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId, B.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS userName, B.TITLE$primary$ AS jikwi, B.DESCRIPTION$primary$ AS deptName, group_concat(A.AUTH_DEPT_ID order by C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$) AS authDeptId, group_concat(C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ order by C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$) AS authDeptName, group_concat(A.AUTH_TYPE order by C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$) AS authType FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.AUTH_DEPT_ID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY A.USER_ID ORDER BY userName
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #selectUserId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'no' AS mine, A.AUTH_TYPE AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A ON D.CN = A.AUTH_DEPT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'yes' AS mine, '' AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.CN = U.DEPARTMENT AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY deptName

select.isEqual:
SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION
SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) ORDER BY deptName

SELECT TBL_DEPTMASTER.displayname AS deptname, TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_dept_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AND TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id WHERE TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.user_id = #userId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#)
TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type = 'M'
UNION SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS dept_name, D.CN AS dept_id, 'add' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D RIGHT JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON (D.CN = A.DEPTID and A.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY deptname

SELECT TBL_DEPTMASTER.displayname AS deptname, TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_dept_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AND TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id WHERE TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.user_id = #userId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#)
TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type = 'M'
UNION SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, IFNULL((SELECT A.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A WHERE A.auth_dept_id = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) AND A.user_id = #userId#), 'R') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS dept_name, D.CN AS dept_id, 'add' AS mine, IFNULL((SELECT A.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A WHERE A.auth_dept_id = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) AND A.user_id = #userId#), 'R') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D RIGHT JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON (D.CN = A.DEPTID and A.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY deptname

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, AUTH_DEPT_ID, AUTH_TYPE) VALUES (#selectUserId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #deptId#, #deptAuth#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT ifnull(SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(IFNULL(A.END_DATE, A.START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + COUNT(A.TYPE_ID), 0) AS COUNT, A.TYPE_ID, #months# AS STAT_MONTH FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND A.WRITER_ID = #userId#
AND A.DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND ( (A.START_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.START_DATE <= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.END_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.START_DATE < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) ) GROUP BY A.TYPE_ID

SELECT CN AS deptId, DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS deptName
'M' AS authType
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# ORDER BY deptName
SELECT COUNT(attitude_id) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND type_id = #typeId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET isdel = '1' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND type_id = #typeId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT attitude_id AS attitudeId, writer_name$primary$ AS writerName, writer_title$primary$ AS writerTitle, writer_dept_name$primary$ AS writerDeptName, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(origin_startdate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS originstartdate, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(origin_enddate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS originenddate, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(change_startdate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'') AS changestartdate, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(change_enddate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'') AS changeenddate, origin_type_name$primary$ AS origintypename, IFNULL(change_type_name$primary$, '') AS changetypename, appr_user_name$primary$ AS apprusername, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(appr_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS apprdate FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND (appr_date >= #searchStartDate# AND appr_date <= #searchEndDate#)
writer_name$primary$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
writer_title$primary$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
WRITER_DEPT_ID = #deptId#
#deptIdList[]#
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$
ORDER BY changestartdate DESC, writerName
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (appr_date >= #searchStartDate# AND appr_date <= #searchEndDate#)
WRITER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
WRITER_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
WRITER_DEPT_ID = #deptId#
#deptIdList[]#
